description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global before_script to run "apk update" and "apk add alpine-sdk cairo-dev dbus dbus-dev gobject-introspection-dev py3-flake8 py3-pylint py3-tox python3-dev", and caches the ".tox/" directory. Define two stages: linters and tests. In the linters stage add a linting job that runs on the "python:alpine" image, has its own before_script executing "apk update" and "apk add py3-dbus py3-flake8 py3-pylint", then runs the scripts "pylint -d C0111,C0103,R1732 networkd_dispatcher.py" and "flake8 networkd_dispatcher.py". In the tests stage add four jobs named test-py3.10, test-py3.11, test-py3.7, and test-py3.8, each using the corresponding "python:3.10-alpine", "python:3.11-alpine", "python:3.7-alpine", and "python:3.8-alpine" images and executing "TOXENV=py310 tox", "TOXENV=py311 tox", "TOXENV=py37 tox", and "TOXENV=py38 tox" respectively. No artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
